nasb.text: Martha therefore, when she heard that Jesus was coming, went to meet Him, but Mary stayed at the house.

esv.text: So when Martha heard that Jesus was coming, she went and met him, but Mary remained seated in the house.

cnv.text: 馬大聽見耶穌來了，就去迎接他，馬利亞卻仍然坐在家裡。

ccb.text: 玛大听说耶稣来了，就去迎接祂，玛丽亚却仍然坐在家里。

csbs.text: 玛妲一听说耶稣来了，就去迎接他。玛丽亚却仍然坐在家里。
